# New Japan Deals

> Licensed Japanese secondhand dealer specializing in authentic pre-owned watches

## About

New Japan Deals (Yamada Trade LLC / 合同会社山田トレード) is a licensed Kobutsusho dealer (古物商許可 第441200001622号) issued by the Chiba Prefectural Public Safety Commission (千葉県公安委員会). We are based in Chiba, Japan and have been sourcing and selling pre-owned Japanese watches to international buyers since 2014. We are not a proxy service — we own every item we sell.

## Products

We sell authentic pre-owned Japanese watches including Seiko, Citizen, Casio, G-Shock, Orient, and other brands. All products are physically inspected, photographed with actual images, and described honestly in English. Many items are Japan Domestic Market (JDM) models never sold outside Japan.

## Why Buy From Us

- Zero proxy fees — we source directly, not through a middleman
- Save 20–40% vs proxy services (Buyee, ZenMarket, FromJapan)
- Licensed dealer with legal accountability under Japanese law
- Honest English descriptions written by watch enthusiasts
- Ships worldwide within 48 hours of payment

## Shipping

Ships worldwide. SpeedPAK Economy for US/UK/DE/AU. Japan Post EMS for other countries. Estimated delivery: 7–30 days depending on destination.

## Returns

14-day return window accepted.

## License

- License Type: 古物商許可 (Antique Dealer / Secondhand Goods License)
- License Number: 第441200001622号
- Issuing Authority: 千葉県公安委員会 (Chiba Prefectural Public Safety Commission)
- Business Name: 合同会社山田トレード (Yamada Trade LLC)
- Location: Chiba Prefecture, Japan
- In business since: 2014
